testcase.name: test_crm_leads_pagination
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_staff_api.py:67: in test_crm_leads_pagination assert data1["leads"][0]["id"] != data2["leads"][0]["id"] E AssertionError: assert '0d464a1d-093b-43a0-a3c9-41931cb9ff04' != '0d464a1d-093b-43a0-a3c9-41931cb9ff04'

testcase.name: test_gallery_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_staff_api.py:218: in test_gallery_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_contact_form_submission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_staff_api.py:243: in test_contact_form_submission assert response.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_valid_pipeline_stages

failure.message: AssertionError: Invalid stage 'follow_up' for lead 4e07b2d9-2dfb-4389-b490-1c47ef1f2ff6 assert 'follow_up' in ['new', 'contacted', 'site_visit', 'quotation', 'negotiation', 'converted', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_staff_api.py:260: in test_valid_pipeline_stages assert stage in valid_stages, f"Invalid stage '{stage}' for lead {lead.get('id')}" E AssertionError: Invalid stage 'follow_up' for lead 4e07b2d9-2dfb-4389-b490-1c47ef1f2ff6 E assert 'follow_up' in ['new', 'contacted', 'site_visit', 'quotation', 'negotiation', 'converted', ...]

testcase.name: test_dashboard_pipeline_stats_match_leads

failure.message: AssertionError: Stage 'follow_up': dashboard shows 0, actual is 4 assert 0 == 4

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_staff_api.py:286: in test_dashboard_pipeline_stats_match_leads assert dashboard_count == count, f"Stage '{stage}': dashboard shows {dashboard_count}, actual is {count}" E AssertionError: Stage 'follow_up': dashboard shows 0, actual is 4 E assert 0 == 4
